name: "A Stall of Her Own" – Applejack
description:
It's a busy Saturday morning at the bustling Canterlot City farmers' market. Applejack has spent weeks preparing for this day: growing, harvesting, and packaging her own special batch of produce to sell at her very first independent stall. She's arranged baskets of perfect Gala apples, jars of homemade apple butter, and bottles of fresh-pressed cider. The market is full of people, and the air is filled with the sounds of chatter and commerce. Her family is nearby at their larger stall, but their attention is on their own customers. For Applejack, this is her moment to stand on her own two feet and prove her entrepreneurial spirit.

[post-Legend of Everfree]
creator: Kitayama
